text_preview:
## Sightings occurred in April, July, October and November – Translation of reports.

## April 21, 1982

“OCCURRENCES – At 23:38Z, the ACC officer informed us that SBKP [Campinas-SP Airport] had informed him that he was seeing a bright light, to the northeast of that location. Immediately I contacted SBKP via telephone. The operator, the civilian FIOR, informed me that he saw a strong light, which was moving quickly, with no identification possible. There was a primary runway on the radar in the position indicated by Campinas (AZ 030/10 MN from SBKP), but it looked more like a meteorological f
summary: Four separate UFO events between April and November 1982 were logged by CINDACTA controllers across Brazil, including radar tracks over Campinas, Brasília, and Goiás with variable speed and altitude.
